---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

# Introduction
## About the Data


# Setup

```{r library}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(readr)
library(here)
```

## Read in data

```{r read data}
#| message: false
bg_chem <- read_csv(here::here("data/BGchem2008data.csv"))
```

# Analysis

```{r analysis}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
colnames(bg_chem)
str(bg_chem)
head(bg_chem)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
summary(bg_chem)
```
## Summary Statistics

```{r summary stats}
nitrate <- mean(bg_chem$NO3)
nitrite <- mean(bg_chem$NO2)
amm     <- mean(bg_chem$NH4)
phos    <- mean(bg_chem$P)
```

## Redfield Ratio

```{r redfield}
#| echo: false
ratio <- (nitrate + nitrite + amm) / phos
```

The Redfield ratio for this dataset is approximately `{r} round(ratio)`.

## Plot

```{r scatter plot}
#| echo: false
plot(bg_chem$P, bg_chem$NO2 + bg_chem$NO3 + bg_chem$NH4)
```

# Conclusion
